next_slice.title: Expose intelligence governance scorecard signals in reader and console ops surfaces

slice_execution_brief.title: Expose intelligence governance scorecard signals in reader and console ops surfaces
slice_execution_brief.summary: Expose intelligence governance scorecard signals in reader and console ops surfaces.
slice_execution_brief.exit_condition: Reader and console ops surfaces expose scorecard signals for coverage, freshness, alert yield, triage throughput, and story conversion.
notes: Prefer scorecard signals that reflect intelligence usefulness, not only collector uptime.
Coverage, freshness, alert yield, triage throughput, and story conversion should stay derivable from existing lifecycle objects.
exit_condition: Reader and console ops surfaces expose scorecard signals for coverage, freshness, alert yield, triage throughput, and story conversion.
